title: diplostephium haenkei
intro: Diplostephium haenkei, a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, is native to the Andean region of South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its chemical compounds, including sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Diplostephium haenkei include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Diplostephium haenkei can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its herbal medicinal uses.
